This project is a Python Discord Bot. Generate code that follows best practices for Discord bots using discord.py. Include clear comments and modular structure. Write Unit tests, run tests after every change. Commit changes to git after each feature finish.

Never use assert in production code. Use proper error handling instead. Always follow PEP 8 style guide for Python code. Use type hints for all functions and variables.

Run tests directly with the pytest command in the configured venv. Ensure all tests pass before committing. Use descriptive commit messages that explain the feature or fix implemented.
